title: Privateer Hiring
description: Pay privateers/pirates to rob along rival routes while ignoring your ships. Use intelligence about competitor routes to target them specifically. Privateers are deniable assets for disrupting competition.
definition-of-done: Privateer hiring action. Privateers target specified routes. Your ships marked as friendly. Privateer effectiveness varies. Cost and success visible.
testing-plan: Verify privateer hiring works. Test route targeting. Verify friendly ship protection. Test effectiveness variation.
